title: Auto status transitions — task.json status auto-advances on run:add and done
goal: Make task status tracking truthful without extra user edits: the first explicit recorded run should advance a task from `todo` to `in_progress`, `done --complete` should close it as `done`, and later run evidence must never auto-regress a manual or completed status.
verificationCommands: npm test -- test/task-service.test.js test/done.test.js test/cli.test.js test/server-api.test.js
